title: Luminous: Halloween
description: Bring a spooky new boss to your Minecraft World!
body:
![Luminous Halloween adds a new boss - the Horseless Headsman - which can be spawned in using an iron golem like statue made of moon stone and a jack o lantern. Moon stone can be made with Moon Shards, dropped rarely from all mobs during a full moon!](https://i.imgur.com/XhV7q2G.png)
When a full moon rises, killing any mob will give a chance for the player to recieve 1-2 MOON SHARDS. Use these valuable stones to craft MOON STONE - a material needed to fight the boss!


A new sword enchantment - LUNAR EDGE - allows players to gain these shards even when the moon isn't full!



By building a T shape out of MOON STONE, and placing a pumpkin on top - you will summon the HORSELESS HEADSMAN!

Killing the Horselss headsman will give you PUMPKIN INGOTS - which are used to craft a new sword and a new helmet, granting the player strength during full moons!


![When a full moon rises, killing any mob will give a chance for the player to recieve 1-2 MOON SHARDS. Use these valuable stones to craft MOON STONE - a material needed to fight the boss!    A new sword enchantment - LUNAR EDGE - allows players to gain these shards even when the moon isn't full!    By building a T shape out of MOON STONE, and placing a pumpkin on top - you will summon the HORSELESS HEADSMAN!  Killing the Horselss headsman will give you PUMPKIN INGOTS - which are used to craft a new sword and a new helmet, granting the player strength during full moons!](https://i.imgur.com/iPLX2gh.png)


This mod is my submission for the Spookyjam 2024 mod jam. It adds 1 new boss, 1 new mob, a new enchantment, a new sword, a new helmet, and a new block set, all revolving around a spooky halloween theme!

THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB
